hero.name: Sapta Wiguna
hero.description: A freelance developer, game builder, and media creator. I build web architectures, mobile apps, and digital experiences backed by core logic, rapid adaptation, and a lifelong love for pop culture.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I am a freelance developer and media creator who builds things across the digital landscape. From web architectures and mobile apps to 2D game programming, graphic design, and video editing, I am hands-on with technology and media. My journey started in elementary school, teaching myself to navigate the web, play PC games, and learn game modding entirely on my own. By junior high, I was writing code, and by high school, I was building functional web and mobile applications.

My approach to software is deeply fueled by a lifelong love for pop culture, including games, music, and movies. I don't just build applications. I understand how algorithms engage users and how game loops dictate experience. While AI allows me to ship complex features in days rather than weeks, I believe a true developer's level lies in understanding core logic and system flow. This foundation lets me adapt, learn new tech stacks rapidly, and deliver high-quality work that stands out.

Beyond code and media, I have a formal background in teaching, holding a degree in Informatics Engineering Education. This unique blend of tech expertise and pedagogical training makes me just as comfortable explaining complex architectures or mentoring teams as I am programming systems.

items.title: SAGE — Smart Automated Grading Engine
items.desc: An automated essay evaluation platform utilizing RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) with LLMs. Built to assist educators in grading essays efficiently and objectively. Accepted as a peer-reviewed research paper.

items.title: My Journal BK Spensix
items.desc: A database-free web journal application built for counselors at SMP Negeri 6 Singaraja. Syncs data directly with private Google Spreadsheets for collaborative, real-time logging.

items.title: Next-Gen Hydroponics Mobile App
items.desc: A smart hydroponics system integrated with IoT, Web, AI, and Solar Energy created during an MBKM internship with DAGO Engineering. Engineered the mobile application for real-time sensor monitoring and automation control.

items.title: Underwater Odyssey
items.desc: A 2D adventure game featuring a platypus, created as a collaborative academic project. Acted as the Main Programmer, implementing game loops, state machines, and asset-based character behaviors.

items.title: Feeding Frenzy Clone
items.desc: A fully independent 2D fish-eating game built from scratch using the Greenfoot engine. Developed custom collision systems and expanded game mechanics without third-party templates.

items.title: Nugi Coffee Shop Reservation
items.desc: A custom web-based reservation and seat-booking system designed for a local coffee shop, streamlining table booking and customer menu pre-orders.

items.title: BGH Villa Booking System
items.desc: A responsive landing page and reservation system built for a villa rental service, allowing guests to view room options, select dates, and book reservations.

items.title: Sahabat Tumbuhan Tri Hita Karana
items.desc: A web-based educational game centered around Balinese plant conservation. Features custom AI-generated graphics and interactive quiz challenges requested by the client.

items.title: Designing Equality: Asa's Journey
items.desc: A 2D animated short film focusing on the UN Sustainable Development Goal of Gender Equality. Designed through tracing techniques and scene composition using The Sims 4 character models.

items.title: Teaching Assistance SMPN 6 Singaraja
items.desc: A documentary video showcasing spontaneous, unscripted classroom teaching activities and student management at SMPN 6 Singaraja.

items.title: Mobile Recipe Application
items.desc: A cross-platform recipe browsing mobile application developed as a final exam project, featuring category filtering, detailed ingredient lists, and instructions.

items.title: Web Developer at SAGE
items.desc: Developed an AI-powered grading engine using LLM integration (Gemini API) and designed multi-role dashboards. Co-authored a published peer-reviewed research paper on Automated Essay Scoring using RAG in RIGGS journal.

items.title: Teaching Assistant at SMPN 6 Singaraja
items.desc: Assisted classroom teaching, managed student activities, and guided junior high school students in understanding technical and programming concepts.

items.title: KRTI 2024 — National Finalist
items.desc: Qualified as a national finalist in the prestigious Kontes Robot Terbang Indonesia (KRTI) 2024 robotics competition, contributing to flight system automation and telemetry control.

items.title: Inventia National Game Dev Competition — 3rd Place
items.desc: Won 3rd Place nationally in the Inventia Game Development Competition, designing, modeling, and programming interactive gameplay loops.

items.title: Mobile & IoT Developer at PT. Dago Engineering
items.desc: Engineered a solar-powered, AI-integrated smart hydroponics monitoring system (Next-Gen Hydroponics) during an MBKM internship. Developed the cross-platform mobile application for real-time sensor monitoring.

items.title: Freelance Developer
items.desc: Developed custom web-based reporting systems, interactive educational games, and reservation softwares for clients, integrating third-party APIs and custom databases.

items.title: FIKSI National Competition — Finalist
items.desc: Selected as a national finalist in the Festival Inovasi dan Kewirausahaan Siswa Indonesia (FIKSI) for developing innovative entrepreneurial technology solutions during SMKN 2 Tabanan.

items.title: Workshop Seminar Committee Lead
items.desc: Led a student organization organizing committee, coordinating 20+ members to deliver a structured, high-impact technical seminar.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.desc: I'm currently open to new opportunities and collaborations. Whether you have a project in mind, a question, or just want to say hi — feel free to reach out!
